_meta.note: ISIN -> partial LookthroughProfile overrides applied on top of the curated PROFILES in src/lib/lookthrough.ts. Empty by default; populated monthly (1st of month, 04:00 UTC) by the refresh-lookthrough GitHub Action. Only the topHoldings array (and its per-ISIN topHoldingsAsOf ISO timestamp) is refreshed here. geo / sector / currency stay hand-curated because justETF Ajax-loads those tables.
